result.stdout:
🤖 Bionic - An Ionic CLI clone for Blazor projects

Usage: Bionic [arguments] [options] [command]

Arguments:
  option           Command Option
  artifact         Artifact Name

Options:
  -s|--start       Prepares Blazor project to mimic Ionic structure
  -g|--generate    Generate pages, components or services/providers
  -v|--version     Print Bionic serial number
  -u|--update      Update Bionic to its latest incarnation
  -un|--uninstall  Initiate Bionic self-destruct sequence
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information

Commands:
  blast            Execute Bionic Blast scripts
  docs             Open Blazor documentation page in browser
  generate         Generate pages, layouts, components or services/providers
  info             Print environment info
  platform         Manage available platforms
  serve            Run hot-reload dev server for app dev/testing
  start            Prepares Blazor project to mimic Ionic structure
  uninstall        Initiate Bionic self-destruct sequence
  update           Update Bionic to its latest incarnation
  version          Print Bionic serial number

Run 'Bionic [command] --help' for more information about a command.

  artifact         Artifact Name

Options:
  -s|--start       Prepares Blazor project to mimic Ionic structure
  -g|--generate    Generate pages, components or services/providers
  -v|--version     Print Bionic serial number

  docs             Open Blazor documentation page in browser
  generate         Generate pages, layouts, components or services/providers

  serve            Run hot-reload dev server for app dev/testing
  start            Prepares Blazor project to mimic Ionic structure

  update           Update Bionic to its latest incarnation
  version          Print Bionic serial number

Run 'Bionic [command] --help' for more information about a command.
